events.title: Methanplateauphase
events.description: Die Methanplateauphase hat nichts mit den Maßnahmen gegen FCKW zu tun, sondern wird auf Rückgang von Methanemissionen und atmosphärische Oxidationskapazität zurückgeführt.

charts.title: Carbon dioxide concentration in the atmosphere — World
charts.description: Atmospheric carbon dioxide (CO₂) concentration is measured in parts per million (ppm). Long-term trends in CO₂ concentrations can be measured at high-resolution using preserved air samples from ice cores.
charts.yAxisLabel: Carbon dioxide concentration in the atmosphere

charts.title: Methane concentration in the atmosphere — World
Temperature change relative to the pre-industrial period — World
charts.description: Temperature anomaly, measured as the difference between the average land-sea surface temperature in a given year and the 1861-1890 mean, in degrees Celsius.
charts.yAxisLabel: Temperature change relative to the pre-industrial period

charts.title: Stratospheric ozone concentration projections — Global
charts.description: Stratospheric ozone concentrations with projections to 2100 based on chemistry-climate models. These are measured as global and regional averages relative to levels in 1960 (1960 = 0). · (1960 = 0)
